description: The company has received a legal order to garnish an employee's wages for child support.

nodes.task_description: Receive and validate the garnishment order from the court.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the order is legitimate and contains all necessary information.

nodes.task_description: Set up the garnishment as a post-tax deduction in the employee's payroll record.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the garnishment to the employee's profile.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the calculated garnishment amount complies with the legal limits (e.g., Consumer Credit Protection Act).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the calculated deduction does not exceed the legal maximum.

nodes.task_description: During the payroll run, remit the garnished amount to the appropriate state agency.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ensures the payment is made to the correct recipient.
